achievements.description: Defeat the Beast King without taking any damage as any class.  Level <=6

achievements.title: Mountains of Treasure
achievements.description: In one session, complete Beast Mountain with all possible treasure chests opened.  Returning to town is okay but count resets if moving to another dungeon.

achievements.title: No Dying on This Hill
achievements.description: In one session, complete Beast Mountain without dying or using an Angel Wing.  Restart from the beginning if failed.  Level <=6

achievements.title: No Window Shopping!
achievements.description: Collect three pieces of Mythril and get an item crafted from them.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: A Summons to Defeat the Generals
achievements.description: Defeat any boss except the Beast King  by summoning a Soul.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Power in the Stone
achievements.description: Find and gain temporary power from a monument of any type besides Mythril.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Weapon Master
achievements.description: Master a weapon or offensive magic skill for any class.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: The Best Resistance
achievements.description: Master any of the elemental resistance skills as a Warrior, Archer or Dragonute.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: A Great Offense
achievements.description: Master any of the extra offensive skills as any class.  Applicable skills are Range, Slow, Critical, Anti-Flying, Break Armor, Undead, and Breath.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: A Great Defense
achievements.description: Master any of the extra defensive/healing skills as any class.  Applicable skills are Def build up,  Efficacy, Mental Power, Res, Heal, and Healing.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: The Mysterious Ninja
achievements.description: Find Kagemaru after Beast Mountain and obtain an Herb from him.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Caught the Ninja
achievements.description: Find Kagemaru after the Labyrinth of Death Shadow and obtain a Healing Drop from him.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: The Value of the Ninja
achievements.description: Find Kagemaru after Egual Dungeon and obtain a Valuing Scroll from him.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Something's Fishy Here
achievements.description: Find Kagemaru after the Forest of Another World and obtain Tasty Sushi from him.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Setting a Cap For It
achievements.description: Find Kagemaru after Glaybull Temple and obtain a Shinobi Helm/Cap from him.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: The Ninja's New Clothes
achievements.description: Find Kagemaru after Deol Waterway and obtain Shinobi Gear from him.
achievements.author: LadyNadia

achievements.title: Geared Up Like a Ninja
achievements.description: Find Kagemaru after the Dark Tower and obtain a Shinobi Bracelet from him.
achievements.author: LadyNadia
